item.title: 让我们谈谈设计模式... | Season 9 of DevDiscuss is here! Let's talk about design patterns...
item.description:
开发团队的Ben Halpern

发表于在首映式中，我的共同主持人@ridhwana和我专注于使用设计模式来改进您与@lydiahallie和@addyosmani一起构建 Web 应用程序的方式——这本书是新书Learning Patterns的合著者。

我们希望您喜欢收听 DevDiscuss 的第 9 季首播：这个节目我们解决了影响我们作为开发人员生活的紧迫问题。

在您最喜欢的播客平台上收听的链接：

  • 听笔记
  • 调入
  • 本杰明·施罗斯 - Apr 25 4月25日



原文:

Ben Halpern for The DEV Team

Posted on May 11

DevDiscuss Season 9 is here! 🎉

In the premiere, my cohost @ridhwana and I focused on using design patterns to improve how you architect web apps with @lydiahallie & @addyosmani — co-authors of the new book Learning Patterns.

We hope you enjoy listening to the season 9 premiere of DevDiscuss: the show where we tackle the burning questions that impact all our lives as developers.

item.author: ben

item.title: 18,000 位关注者 AMA 🙀 | 18,000 followers AMA 🙀
item.description:
亚当克罗克特

发表于你们不知怎么做到的，让我觉得自己很有名，从地板上提高了我的自尊心，并推动我通过工作面试，赋予我魅力和魅力。

我一直在学习如何与其他人相处，该说什么以及如何说，这完全取决于技术写作和你惊人的追随者。

如果你不太了解我，这里有几件事我从未在这里告诉过任何人。

  • 我出生在一个悲伤的世界，几个月大时从父母身边带走并被寄养，我的母亲患有肺痨病和穿着不好的感觉
  • 我一直觉得自己像个陌生的孩子，也许我永远不会有太多的数据，但我从不放弃，我想在某件事上做到最好
  • 那年我认识了我的女朋友，她现在是我孩子的妈妈
  • 大学毕业后，在艰难的时期，我创办了一家企业并经营了 3.5 年，为当地政府和小企业制作网站，它让我们大部分时间都维持生计
  • 过了一会儿，我决定我需要一份稳定的工作，宝宝要来了！ 我在linkedin上问了我在戴森IT能找到的最资深的人，他说进来面试（要东西，这很重要！）
  • 在戴森工作了几年后，我来到了这里，成为了我最喜欢的开发人员职位。 我看到的堆栈比大多数人看到的都要多，我会专业地告诉你它如何改进以及我发现了哪些安全漏洞。
  • 我的儿子是自闭症，部分语言，他的生活会和我完全不同，我担心我离开后他会发生什么，我从无到有过着成功的生活，现在他在一个可爱的家中安顿下来，他是如此被爱，但他没有像我这样的选择更多，他就是他自己，这不应该吓到我，但确实如此。

所以这就是我现在，非常感谢你们，我会继续努力想出你们想听的东西！ 我们一起成长💗

安东尼奥·吉戈 - 普里亚斯利瓦斯塔瓦 - 桑多尔达戈 - Jun 19 '21 21 年 6 月 19 日



原文:

Adam Crockett

Posted on May 11

Somehow you guys did it you made me feel famous, raised my self esteem from the floor and pushed me through job interviews granting me charm and charisma.

I have been learning how to behave around other humans what to say and how to say it and it's all down to technical writing and your amazing following.

If you dont know me so well, here's a few things I have never told anyone on here.

  • I was born into a sad kind of world, taken from my parents at just a few months old and placed into foster care, my mother suffered/s from phycosis and a bad dress sense
  • I always felt like an alien kid and perhaps I would never amount to much after all that's what the statistics said, but I never ever give up, I wanted to be the best at something
  • at 18 I had to leave and find a place to live, I fell into University studying art because it was a kind of therapy, I learned graphic design and wrote a portfolio website or two but for paintings not code
  • I met my girlfriend that year who is now the mother of my child
  • after university, times where tough, I started a business and ran it for 3.5 years making websites for local government and small businesses, it kept us afloat most of the time
  • After a while I decided that I needed a stable job, the baby was coming! I asked on linkedin the most senior person I could find in Dyson IT, he said come on in and have an interview (ask for stuff, it's important!)
  • After a successful few years at Dyson I landed here in my absolutely favourite position being kind of a developer. I see more stacks than most will ever see and I get to professionaly tell you how it can improve and what security flaws I find.
  • my son is Autistic and partially verbal, he will have a very different life than me and I worry what will happen to him when I'm gone, I had a successful life from nothing, now he's setup in a lovely home, he is so loved but he hasn't got a choice like me to be more, he is exactly who he is, that should not scare me but it does.

So that's me right now, thank you all so much and I will continue to try to think of stuff you want to hear about! We grow together 💗

Antonio Djigo - Jun 14 '21

Priya Srivastava - Jun 19 '21

Sandor Dargo - Jun 19 '21
item.author: adam_cyclones

item.title: Pegam - 受密码保护的消息共享平台 | Pegam - Password Protected Message Sharing Platform
item.description:
我在 dev.to 上看到了这个 Appwrite 黑客马拉松，我想我被大数字或免费 T 恤的承诺所吸引，但我认为“我可以做到这一点！” 所以现在我正在这样做。
它的 Pegam - 受密码保护和加密的消息共享平台

我的提交概述

它是一个文件和消息共享文件，您可以在其中向任何人发送加密的受密码保护的消息并将其共享给任何人。 由于我的考试，我以为我在 3 天内就完成了这个，但我认为它对于这个黑客马拉松来说非常好。 使用的技术栈是 React JS、Material UI 和 Appwrite。
许可证：麻省理工学院许可证： https ://github.com/kafle1/pegam-hackathon/blob/master/LICENSE

提交类别：

数据库：



原文:

I saw this Appwrite hackathon on dev.to and I guess I was taken in by the big numbers or the promise of a free t-shirt, but one way or another I thought “I could do that!” and so now I’m doing that.
Its Pegam - Password Protected & Encrypted Message Sharing Platform

Overview of My Submission

Its a file and message sharing file where you can send encrypted password protected messages to anyone and share it to anyone. Thought I have built this within 3 days due to my exams but i think its pretty good for this hackathon. The tech stacks which were used was React JS, Material UI and Appwrite.
Github Repository: https://github.com/kafle1/pegam-hackathon

License: MIT License : https://github.com/kafle1/pegam-hackathon/blob/master/LICENSE

item.title: Codecademy 最终项目：CPU 模拟器 | Codecademy Final Project: CPU Simulator
item.description:
我选择制作一个汇编程序来解析指令和数据输入，以便使用 MIPS32 指令集架构来存储内存总线和 CPU 进行处理。

我在 VS Code 中编写了程序，使用三个文件来拆分模拟器的不同部分。 主 CPU 模拟器文件包含汇编程序和 CPU 类。 汇编器类解析汇编语言文本文件并输出机器代码供CPU处理，CPU类是操作模拟器和调用其组件功能的主要类。

内存文件包含父内存类、从内存类继承的缓存和主内存类，以及连接CPU和内存的内存总线类。

这是数据指令输入文件，指令输入文件包含主要指令，包括高速缓存操作、立即数和寄存器加法、跳转指令和暂停终止指令。

主程序文件仅调用汇编程序和 CPU 类的实例，而 CPU 类调用包含其余 CPU 组件实例（包括内存总线）的控制单元。 然后内存总线调用缓存和主内存实例，将 CPU 连接到内存。

查看GitHub 上的代码



原文:

The portfolio project for Codecademy's computer architecture course in computer science is to make a CPU simulator that shows the inner workings of a CPU and its connection to memory by processing instructions and providing console output of input processing. I chose to make an assembler to parse instruction and data input for a memory bus to store and the CPU to process using MIPS32 instruction set architecture.

Python Code

I wrote the program in VS Code using three files to split up the different parts of the simulator. The main CPU simulator file contains the assembler and CPU classes. The assembler class parses assembly language text files and outputs machine code for the CPU to process and the CPU class is the main class to operate the simulator and call the functionality of its components.

The CPU components file contains classes for the three main components of the CPU, the control unit, registers, and arithmetic logic unit (ALU). The memory file contains the parent memory class, the cache and main memory classes that inherit from the memory class, and the memory bus class that connects the CPU to memory.

The data values and instructions for the CPU are modified Codecademy files and I added an instruction file to load the data values to CPU registers from memory instead of manually moving them to the registers. This is the data instruction input file and instruction input file contains the main instructions, which include a cache operation, immediate and register addition, a jump instruction, and a halt termination instruction.

The main program file only calls instances of the assembler and CPU classes and the CPU class calls the control unit which contains the rest of the CPU component instances, including the memory bus. The memory bus then calls the cache and main memory instances, connecting the CPU to memory.

See code on GitHub
item.author: lilacode

item.title: 生态系统和框架：我在 Netlify 的角色 | Ecosystem and Frameworks: My Role at Netlify
item.description:
我很好奇这些天你们都对哪些前端框架感兴趣？ 使用 Vue 和 React 等库构建了强大的元框架。 想到 Next.js ： Remix是一个新的竞争者，我们还有其他值得注意的项目，如SvelteKit 、 Astro 、 Eleventy等。

我在Netlify 担任新职务，在生态系统团队中从事框架工作。 目前，我们的工作是确保您部署到 Netlify 的任何内容都能无缝部署，因为我确信它会发展。 我这么说并不是为了宣传 Netlify，尽管这太不可思议了。 这是为了表达我对这种角色的兴奋。

我需要知道所有这些框架现在在我的新角色中是如何工作的，这非常令人兴奋。

例如，如果你不知道，Netlify 几周前发布了他们的Edge 功能。 我的同事萨尔玛有一篇关于他们的好帖子。

我的另一位出色的同事 Eduardo 发表了一篇关于 Netlify Edge 功能的深入探讨文章。

我提出这个是因为我在 Netlify 继续从事开源工作。 在 GitHub 上关注他们的代码。

我正在研究 Remix 框架中的 Netlify Edge 功能问题。

我们很高兴你在这里！

想知道更多？ 阅读Remix 的技术说明

此存储库包含 Remix 源代码。 这个 repo 正在进行中，因此我们感谢您在我们解决问题时的耐心等待。

文档

有关 Remix 的文档，请访问我们的网站。

另外，请加入我们的 Discord 社区。

文档是在每次发布时从docs目录中的文件自动生成的。

贡献

如果您对贡献代码和/或文档感兴趣，请参阅我们的贡献指南。

行为守则

如有任何问题，请参阅我们的行为准则……

一名核心团队成员在让 Edge 功能与 Remix 一起使用时遇到了问题。 经过一些有趣的侦探工作，我发现了问题所在。 相比之下，常规的无服务器函数在 Node.js 领域使用不​​符合 Web 标准的 polyfill。

它还没有修复，至少在写这篇文章时是这样，但 Remix 核心团队正在努力解决这个问题。 公开解决问题并分享我的发现非常有趣，因为这是开源宝贝！

我很高兴继续探索这个角色，与开发者社区、我们的客户和开源合作！

和平偷看！

Photo by Alex Kondratiev on Unsplash 亚历克斯·康德拉季耶夫在Unsplash上拍摄的照片



原文:

I'm curious what frontend frameworks you're all interested in these days? Powerful meta frameworks have been built using libraries like Vue and React. Next.js comes to mind: Remix is a new contender, and we have other notable projects like SvelteKit, Astro, Eleventy, etc.

I'm on the ecosystem team working on frameworks in my new role at Netlify. Our job, at the moment, because I'm sure it will evolve, is to ensure whatever you deploy to Netlify deploys seamlessly. I'm not saying this to promote Netlify, although it's incredible. It's to express my excitement at this type of role.

I need to know how all these frameworks work now in my new role, which is super exciting.

For example, if you weren't aware, Netlify released their Edge functions offering a couple of weeks ago. My coworker Salma has a great post about them.

My other awesome coworker Eduardo released a deep dive article about Netlify Edge functions.

I bring this up because I get to continue to work in open source in my role at Netlify. Edge functions use the amazing Deno project, a modern open-source runtime for JavaScript and Typescript.

Deno Land has 53 repositories available. Follow their code on GitHub.

I was looking into an issue with Netlify Edge functions within the Remix framework.

We are happy you're here!

Remix is a full stack web framework that lets you focus on the user interface and work back through web fundamentals to deliver a fast, slick, and resilient user experience that deploys to any Node.js server and even non-Node.js environments at the edge like Cloudflare Workers.

Want to know more? Read the Technical Explanation of Remix

This repository contains the Remix source code. This repo is a work in progress, so we appreciate your patience as we figure things out.

Documentation

For documentation about Remix, please visit our website.

Also, please join our community on Discord.

The documentation is automatically generated on each release from the files in the docs directory.

Contributing

If you're interested in contributing code and/or documentation, please see our guide to contributing.

Code of Conduct

Please see our code of conduct for any questions…

One of the core team members had issues getting Edge functions to work with Remix. After some fun detective work, I figured out the issue. TLDR; a polyfill wasn't web standards compliant, so the bug only occurred when Edge functions because Deno is web standards compliant. In contrast, regular serverless functions used the non-web standards-compliant polyfill in Node.js land.

It's not fixed yet, at least when writing this post, but the Remix core team is working on it. It was tons of fun to figure things out publicly and share my findings, as this is open-source baby!

I'm stoked to continue exploring this role, working with the developer community, our customers, and open-source!

Peace peeps!

Photo by Alex Kondratiev on Unsplash
item.author: nickytonline

item.title: 使用 Github Actions 和 IFTTT 自动执行定期 Venmo 付款 | Automate Recurring Venmo Payments with Github Actions and IFTTT
item.description:
像许多修补匠一样，我喜欢自动化我生活的一小部分，而忽略我应该做的任何实际工作。 在偶然发现Joe 的 Venmo 自动化之后，我立即将所有重要的事情从我的盘子里扫了出来，以获得一些乐趣。 现在让我们在不到一个小时的时间内在 Venmo上设置自动付款 - 使用电子邮件通知让您高枕无忧！

为什么不使用 Nocode（Zapier、IFTTT 等）

您需要知道如何为本指南编写少量代码。 此设置是 Zapier Venmo 集成和 IFTTT Venmo 集成的替代方案，它们似乎不再存在（如果它们曾经存在的话）。 通常我会首先为项目寻找nocode 工具，但不幸的是，在这种情况下，您需要知道如何在线运行代码。

原料

您需要设置 3 件（不到 1 小时）：

  • 计划的触发器（GitHub 操作、AWS Cloudwatch 等）
  • 运行 Python 脚本的地方 + 它的依赖项（GitHub 操作、PythonAnywhere、带有Autocode的 Node.js 正在探索中）
  • 免费或廉价的通知服务（IFTTT、AWS SNS 等）

我使用GitHub Actions + Python 脚本 + IFTTT来发送电子邮件，但如果您有其他想法，请随时跳出常规。

如何在 Venmo 上设置自动付款

潜入你来找的肉和土豆，如何真正让这该死的东西运转起来。

  1. 注册 IFTTT 帐户（可能需要下载应用程序）。

  2. 在 IFTTT 中配置Webhooks 服务。

  3. 然后设置您选择的通知服务。 我的示例脚本发送有关在 IFTTT 提供的value1字段中发送的 Venmo 请求的元数据。 如果您使用相同的，您必须确保正确映射到您选择的通知服务。

  • 将您的 webhook URL 保存为 Secret，以便工作流可以访问它。 在浏览器中，转到GitHub Repo -> Settings -> Secrets -> New Repository Secret 。

  1. 此令牌与您的 Venmo 帐户具有相同的功能，因此请务必小心！ 除非您手动注销，否则它永远不会过期，如文档中所述。

    我计划在不久的将来更新本指南以使用支付链接（一个不需要帐户访问权限的 Venmo 应用程序的深层链接），但现在，您已被预先警告。
    您必须熟悉使用 Python 依赖项才能在本地运行这些脚本。

     from venmo_api import Client # https://github.com/mmohades/Venmo print("Login using account to get an access token for the API.") email = input('Venmo Email:') if '@' not in email: print('! yo what the heck you sure thats an email') raise SystemExit password = input('Venmo Password:') Client.get_access_token(username=email, password=password)
  • 通过转到GitHub Repo -> Settings -> Secrets -> New Repository Secret将令牌保存为 Secret VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN 。

  1. 然后 Venmo API 要求支付请求绑定到一个 ID，而不是我们人类在应用程序中使用的@username 。 我在设置期间进行了用户名映射并将它们添加为环境机密，但您可以轻松添加 1 个额外的 LOC 以在常规运行期间进行转换。

     user = venmo_client.user.get_user_by_username(username) # Key is the 'user.id' part venmo_client.payment.request_money(amount, note, target_user_id=user.id, privacy_setting=PaymentPrivacy.PRIVATE)

  2. 我使用的脚本有一个简单的入口点，然后为我希望它发出的每个 Venmo 请求定义一个单独的函数 YMMV。 您需要根据需要发出多少请求以及获取 Venmo 用户 ID 的方式进行一些小的调整。 最重要的部分可以归结为这个main.py ：

     # main.py import os from venmo_api import Client, PaymentPrivacy # requests is pulled in by venmo_api import requests TOKEN_KEY = 'VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN' IFTTT_WEBHOOK_KEY = 'IFTTT_WEBHOOK' def main(): # load the access token from environ access_token = os.environ.get(TOKEN_KEY) if access_token is None: raise ValueError('[!] EVERYTHING IS BROKEN WE CANT GET ACCESSS AHHHHHH') venmo_client = Client(access_token=access_token) .... # <venmo user id from mapping step> c_user_id = os.environ.get('C_USER_ID') amount = 20.0 note = f'Monthly Internet' try: venmo_client.payment.request_money(amount, note, target_user_id=c_user_id, privacy_setting=PaymentPrivacy.PRIVATE) print('Successfully requested for internet $$') msg = f'Requested ${amount} Internet from C.' except Exception as e: print(e) msg = '[!] Failed to request $$ for internet from C.' notify(msg) .... def notify(msg): # notify with IFTTT webhook ifttt_webhook_url = os.environ.get(IFTTT_WEBHOOK_KEY) if ifttt_webhook_url is None: raise ValueError('[!] Dang, no webhook so cant notify myself :(') json_data = { 'value1': msg } resp = requests.post(ifttt_webhook_url, json=json_data) print(resp.status_code) if resp.status_code >= 300: raise ValueError(f'Webhook resp was {resp.status_code}; not a success. Body: {resp.text}') main()

  3. 如果你没有，回去做。

    现在在.github/workflows/<workflow-name>.yml创建您的工作流定义。 这是您将在cron中定义您的日程安排的地方。 我的示例显示了每月的 Venmo 请求。

     # <workflow-name>.yml name: Run Recurring Venmo on: schedule: # 5/6pm EDT on the 10th of the month. - cron: "0 10 10 * *" workflow_dispatch: jobs: run: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v2 - name: Set up Python 3.7 uses: actions/setup-python@v2 with: python-version: 3.7 - name: Install dependencies run: | pip install pipenv pipenv install - name: Run script # https://pipenv.pypa.io/en/latest/advanced/#automatic-loading-of-env; this is somewhat silly but I wanted to finish quick run: | echo VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN=$VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN >> .env echo GF_VENMO_USER_ID=$GF_VENMO_USER_ID >> .env echo C_USER_ID=$C_USER_ID >> .env echo IFTTT_WEBHOOK=$IFTTT_WEBHOOK >> .env pipenv run python main.py env: VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN }} GF_VENMO_USER_ID: ${{ secrets.GF_VENMO_USER_ID }} C_USER_ID: ${{ secrets.C_USER_ID }} IFTTT_WEBHOOK: ${{ secrets.IFTTT_WEBHOOK }}

  4. 但是，嘿，我们学到了一些巧妙的东西并学习了一些新的自动化技巧。 时间花得很好。

切换到支付链接后在Autocode上编写 Node.js 函数。



原文:

Like so many tinkerers, I love to automate small parts of my life, while ignoring any actual work I should be doing. After stumbling on Joe’s Venmo automation, I immediately swept all the important things off my plate to have some fun. Now let’s set up automatic payments on Venmo in less than an hour — with email notifications for peace of mind!

Why not Nocode (Zapier, IFTTT, etc.)

You’ll need to know how to code a small amount for this guide. This setup is an alternative to the Zapier Venmo integration and IFTTT Venmo integration, which don’t seem to exist anymore (if they ever did). Venmo shut down their developer APIs and have had them in maintenance mode since 2016, so unlikely for anything to change on that front. Normally I look to nocode tools first for projects, but unfortunately in this case, you’ll need to know how to run code online.

Ingredients

The 3 pieces you will need to set this up (in <1 hour):

  • A scheduled trigger (GitHub actions, AWS Cloudwatch, etc.)
  • A place to run a Python script + it’s dependency (GitHub actions, PythonAnywhere, Node.js with Autocode is in exploration)
  • A free or cheap notification service (IFTTT, AWS SNS, etc.)

I use GitHub Actions + Python script + IFTTT for sending emails, but feel free to step off the beaten path if you have other ideas.

How to set up automatic payments on Venmo

Diving into the meat & potatoes you came for, how to actually get this dang thing running.

  1. (Optional) 💌 Set up IFTTT notifications

    ℹ️ If you don’t care about being notified, skip this step and remove the notify() code in script.

    IFTTT allows a variety of target services, I originally used SMS, then converted to email since it’s not an urgent alert.

    • Sign up for IFTTT account (might require downloading of the app).
    • Configure the Webhooks service in IFTTT.

    • Then set up your chosen notification service. My example script sends metadata about the Venmo request sent in the value1 field IFTTT provides. If you use the same, you'll have to make sure that is mapped correctly to your chosen notification service.

  • ✅ Use cURL or your favorite web request tool to test your webhook and ensure notifications are sending correctly.
  • Save your webhook URL as a Secret so the workflow can access it. In the browser, go to GitHub Repo -> Settings -> Secrets -> New Repository Secret.

  1. 🔐 Get Venmo access token

    ⚠️🚨
    This token has the same power with your Venmo account as you do, so be very careful with it! It will never expire unless you logout manually, as explained in the docs.

    I plan to update this guide to use Payment Links (a deeplink into the Venmo app that doesn’t require account access) in the near future, but for now, you are forewarned.
    ⚠️🚨

    You’ll have to be comfortable working with Python dependencies to run these scripts locally.

    from venmo_api import Client
# https://github.com/mmohades/Venmo

print("Login using account to get an access token for the API.")
email = input('Venmo Email:')
if '@' not in email:
    print('! yo what the heck you sure thats an email')
    raise SystemExit
password = input('Venmo Password:')

Client.get_access_token(username=email, password=password)
  • Save the token as the Secret VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN by going to GitHub Repo -> Settings -> Secrets -> New Repository Secret.

  1. (Optional) 🗺 Map Venmo usernames to IDs

    Then Venmo API requires payment requests to be tied to an ID, rather than the @username we humans use in the app. I did the mapping of usernames during setup and added them as environment secrets, but you can just as easily add 1 extra LOC to convert during regular runs.

    user = venmo_client.user.get_user_by_username(username)
# Key is the 'user.id' part
venmo_client.payment.request_money(amount, note, target_user_id=user.id, privacy_setting=PaymentPrivacy.PRIVATE)

  2. 🐍 Modify the Python script

    The script I use has a simple entry point, then defines a separate function for each Venmo request I want it to make, YMMV. You’ll need to make some small adjustments based on how many requests you need it to make & how you fetch Venmo user IDs. The most important bits can be boiled down to this main.py:

    # main.py

import os
from venmo_api import Client, PaymentPrivacy
# requests is pulled in by venmo_api
import requests

TOKEN_KEY = 'VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN'
IFTTT_WEBHOOK_KEY = 'IFTTT_WEBHOOK'

def main():
    # load the access token from environ
    access_token = os.environ.get(TOKEN_KEY)
    if access_token is None:
        raise ValueError('[!] EVERYTHING IS BROKEN WE CANT GET ACCESSS AHHHHHH')

    venmo_client = Client(access_token=access_token)

....
        # <venmo user id from mapping step>
        c_user_id = os.environ.get('C_USER_ID') 
        amount = 20.0
        note = f'Monthly Internet'
        try:
        venmo_client.payment.request_money(amount, note, target_user_id=c_user_id, privacy_setting=PaymentPrivacy.PRIVATE)
            print('Successfully requested for internet $$')
          msg = f'Requested ${amount} Internet from C.'
        except Exception as e:
            print(e)
            msg = '[!] Failed to request $$ for internet from C.'
        notify(msg)

....

def notify(msg):
    # notify with IFTTT webhook
    ifttt_webhook_url = os.environ.get(IFTTT_WEBHOOK_KEY)
    if ifttt_webhook_url is None:
        raise ValueError('[!] Dang, no webhook so cant notify myself :(')

    json_data = {
        'value1': msg
    }
    resp = requests.post(ifttt_webhook_url, json=json_data)
    print(resp.status_code)
    if resp.status_code >= 300:
        raise ValueError(f'Webhook resp was {resp.status_code}; not a success. Body: {resp.text}')

main()

  3. 👨‍💻 Configure GitHub Secrets & Actions

    ℹ️ Cron actions get disabled after 60 days of no activity on the repository - so either plan to push a commit every 50 days, or follow my approach and just wait until GitHub emails you.

    ✋ At this point you should have your VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN saved in Secrets, along with the optional IFTTT_WEBHOOK or USER_IDs values. if you didn’t, go back and do it.

    Now create your workflow definition at .github/workflows/<workflow-name>.yml . This is where you will define your schedule in cron. My example shows monthly Venmo requests.

    # <workflow-name>.yml

name: Run Recurring Venmo

on:
  schedule:
    # 5/6pm EDT on the 10th of the month.
    - cron: "0 10 10 * *"
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  run:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Set up Python 3.7
        uses: actions/setup-python@v2
        with:
          python-version: 3.7
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          pip install pipenv
          pipenv install
      - name: Run script 
        # https://pipenv.pypa.io/en/latest/advanced/#automatic-loading-of-env; this is somewhat silly but I wanted to finish quick
        run: |
          echo VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN=$VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN >> .env
          echo GF_VENMO_USER_ID=$GF_VENMO_USER_ID >> .env
          echo C_USER_ID=$C_USER_ID >> .env
          echo IFTTT_WEBHOOK=$IFTTT_WEBHOOK >> .env
          pipenv run python main.py
        env:
          VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.VENMO_ACCESS_TOKEN }}
          GF_VENMO_USER_ID: ${{ secrets.GF_VENMO_USER_ID }}
          C_USER_ID: ${{ secrets.C_USER_ID }}
          IFTTT_WEBHOOK: ${{ secrets.IFTTT_WEBHOOK }}

  4. 🏖️ Sit back and relax - with your automation in place, you’re now saving MINUTES each month! 🤣

    But hey, we learned something neat and learned some new automation tricks. Time well spent.

🧪 Experiments & potential improvements

  • Writing Node.js function on Autocode after switching to Payment Links.
item.author: idontremember

item.title: 使用图像示例生成 Laravel PDF | Generate Laravel PDF with Image Example
item.description:
原贴@https ://codeanddeploy.com访问并下载示例代码：
在这篇文章中，我将向您展示如何使用图像生成 Laravel PDF 的示例。 在我之前的示例中，我有一个如何从 HTML 实现 Laravel PDF 的示例。 现在让我们将图像包含在您的 PDF 文件中。

通常，我们会在 PDF 中包含产品报告的图像、带有公司徽标的发票，或者可能是屏幕截图的报告。

首先，我们需要安装 Laravel。 如果已经安装就跳过。

第 1 步：Laravel 安装

如果您的本地没有安装 Laravel 8，只需运行以下命令：

 composer create - project -- prefer - dist laravel / laravel laravel - pdf - image - example cd laravel - pdf - image - example

第二步：安装 dompdf 包

要在 Laravel 中生成 HTML 到 PDF，我们需要安装barryvdh/laravel-dompdf包。 运行以下命令：

 composer require barryvdh / laravel - dompdf

第 3 步：设置路由和控制器

让我们为 Laravel PDF 生成器创建路由和控制器。

路由.php/web.php

 <?php use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route ; use App\Http\Controllers\PdfController ; /* |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Web Routes |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Here is where you can register web routes for your application. These | routes are loaded by the RouteServiceProvider within a group which | contains the "web" middleware group. Now create something great! | */ Route :: get ( '/' , function () { return view ( 'welcome' ); }); Route :: get ( 'pdf' , [ PdfController :: class , 'index' ]);

运行以下命令来制作控制器：

 php artisan make : controller PdfController

然后编辑生成的PdfController 。 见下文：

 <?php namespace App\Http\Controllers ; use PDF ; use Illuminate\Http\Request ; class PdfController extends Controller { public function index () { $pdf = PDF :: loadView ( 'pdf.sample-with-image' , [ 'title' => 'CodeAndDeploy.com Laravel Pdf with Image Example' , 'description' => 'This is an example Laravel pdf with Image tutorial.' , 'footer' => 'by <a href="https://codeanddeploy.com">codeanddeploy.com</a>' ]); return $pdf -> download ( 'sample-with-image.pdf' ); } }

第 4 步：设置视图

现在，让我们使用图像生成器为 PDF 设置视图。 在此示例中，我在resources/views/中创建了一个pdf文件夹，然后创建了一个刀片文件sample-with-image.blade.php 。 请参见下面的示例代码：

 <!DOCTYPE html> <html> <head> <title> {{ $title }} </title> </head> <body> <p> {{ $description }} </p> <br> <p> Put your text here. </p> <p> Place your dynamic content here. </p> <br/> <br/> <br/> <strong> Public Folder: </strong> <img src= "{{ public_path('images/codeanddeploy.jpg') }}" style= "width: 20%" > <br/> <br/> <br/> <strong> Storage Folder: </strong> <img src= "{{ storage_path('app/public/images/codeanddeploy.jpg') }}" style= "width: 20%" > <br/> <br> <p style= "text-align: center;" > {!! $footer !!} </p> </body> </html>

注意：您必须在 public 中有images文件夹，在\storage\app\public中有images文件夹，并且您的图像必须存在于指定的文件夹中。 你可以随意命名它。

现在，我们的代码已经准备好了，让我们通过运行以下命令来测试它：

然后将下面的 URL 运行到您的浏览器：

 http :// 127.0.0.1 : 8000 / pdf

这是使用 dompdf 生成带有图像的 Laravel PDF 结果的示例：

我希望本教程可以帮助你。 如果您想下载此代码，请访问此处https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/generate-laravel-pdf-with-image-example 。

快乐编码:)



原文:

Originally posted @ https://codeanddeploy.com visit and download the sample code:
https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/generate-laravel-pdf-with-image-example

In this post, I will show you an example of how to generate a Laravel PDF with an image. In my previous example, I have an example of how to implement Laravel PDF from HTML. Now let's include the image in your PDF file.

Usually, we include images on PDF for a product report, invoices that have a company logo, or maybe a report that is a screenshot.

To start we need to install Laravel. Just skip if already installed.

Step 1: Laravel Installation

If you don't have a Laravel 8 install in your local just run the following command below:

composer create-project --prefer-dist laravel/laravel laravel-pdf-image-example cd laravel-pdf-image-example

Step 2: Install dompdf Package

To generate HTML to PDF in Laravel we need to install barryvdh/laravel-dompdf package. Run the following command below:

composer require barryvdh/laravel-dompdf

Step 3: Setup Routes and Controller

Let's create routes and controller for our Laravel PDF generator.

routes.php/web.php

<?php use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route;
use App\Http\Controllers\PdfController; /*
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Web Routes
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------
|
| Here is where you can register web routes for your application. These
| routes are loaded by the RouteServiceProvider within a group which
| contains the "web" middleware group. Now create something great!
|
*/ Route::get('/', function () { return view('welcome');
}); Route::get('pdf', [PdfController::class, 'index']);

Run the command below to make a controller:

php artisan make:controller PdfController

Then edit the PdfController generated. See below:

<?php namespace App\Http\Controllers; use PDF;
use Illuminate\Http\Request; class PdfController extends Controller
{ public function index() { $pdf = PDF::loadView('pdf.sample-with-image', [ 'title' => 'CodeAndDeploy.com Laravel Pdf with Image Example', 'description' => 'This is an example Laravel pdf with Image tutorial.', 'footer' => 'by <a href="https://codeanddeploy.com">codeanddeploy.com</a>' ]); return $pdf->download('sample-with-image.pdf'); }
}

Step 4: Setup View

Now, let's set up our view for our PDF with an image generator. In this example, I create a pdf folder inside resources/views/then create a blade file sample-with-image.blade.php. See below sample code:

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head> <title>{{ $title }}</title>
</head>
<body> <p>{{ $description }}</p> <br> <p>Put your text here.</p> <p>Place your dynamic content here.</p> <br/> <br/> <br/> <strong>Public Folder:</strong> <img src="{{ public_path('images/codeanddeploy.jpg') }}" style="width: 20%"> <br/> <br/> <br/> <strong>Storage Folder:</strong> <img src="{{ storage_path('app/public/images/codeanddeploy.jpg') }}" style="width: 20%"> <br/> <br> <p style="text-align: center;">{!! $footer !!}</p>
</body>
</html>

NOTE: You must have images folder inside public and images folder inside \storage\app\public and your image must exist in the stated folder. You can name it what you want.

Now, our code is ready let's test it by running the commands below:

then run the URL below to your browser:


http://127.0.0.1:8000/pdf

Here is the example generated a result of Laravel PDF with images using dompdf:

I hope this tutorial can help you. Kindly visit here https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/generate-laravel-pdf-with-image-example if you want to download this code.

Happy coding :)
item.author: codeanddeploy

item.title: 如何在 Laravel 8 中打印或获取上次执行的查询 | How to Print or Get Last Executed Query in Laravel 8
item.description:
原贴@https ://codeanddeploy.com访问并下载示例代码：
在这篇文章中，我将向你展示如何在 Laravel 8 应用程序中打印或获取最后执行的查询。 有时我们需要这样做来记录或调试并确定查询的性能。

幸运的是，Laravel 提供了一种获取最后执行的查询的方法，我将向您展示如何操作。

在 Laravel Eloquent 中获取最后一个查询

在这个例子中，我们将只添加 toSql() 方法到我们的 eloquent 查询中。 请参见以下示例：

 $user = User :: where ( 'id' , 1 ) -> toSql (); dd ( $user );

见下面的输出：

 "select * from `users` where `id` = ?"

在 Laravel Eloquent 中记录最后一个查询

在这个方法中，我们将记录最后一个 Laravel eloquent 查询。 请参见下面的示例代码：

 DB :: enableQueryLog (); $user = User :: get (); $query = DB :: getQueryLog (); dd ( $query );

样本输出：

 array:1 [▼ 0 => array:3 [▼ "query" => "select * from `users`" "bindings" => [] "time" => 30.66 ] ]

调试最后一个 Laravel Eloquent 查询

在这个示例中，我们将调试最后一个 Laravel eloquent 查询。 见下面的代码：

 DB :: enableQueryLog (); $user = User :: get (); $query = DB :: getQueryLog (); $query = end ( $query ); dd ( $query );

样本输出：

 array:3 [▼ "query" => "select * from `users`" "bindings" => [] "time" => 22.04 ]

获取/打印最后执行的 MySQL 查询

在本节中，我们将获取/打印最后执行的 MySQL 查询。 请参见以下示例：

 \ DB :: enableQueryLog (); $users = \ DB :: table ( "users" ) -> get (); $query = \ DB :: getQueryLog (); dd ( end ( $query ));

输出：

 array:3 [▼ "query" => "select * from `users`" "bindings" => [] "time" => 26.94 ]

现在你已经了解了如何在 Laravel 应用程序中记录/调试最后执行的查询。

我希望本教程可以帮助你。 如果您想下载此代码，请访问此处https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/how-to-print-or-get-last-executed-query-in-laravel-8 。

快乐编码:)



原文:

Originally posted @ https://codeanddeploy.com visit and download the sample code:
https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/how-to-print-or-get-last-executed-query-in-laravel-8

In this post, I will show you how to print or get the last executed query in your Laravel 8 application. Sometimes we need to do this to log or debug and determine what is the performance of our queries.

Luckily Laravel provides a method to get the last executed query and I will show you how.

Get Last Query in Laravel Eloquent

In this example, we will just add toSql() method to our eloquent query. See the below example:

$user = User::where('id',1)->toSql();
dd($user);

See below output:

"select * from `users` where `id` = ?"

Log Last Query in Laravel Eloquent

In this method, we will log our last Laravel eloquent query. See below example code:

DB::enableQueryLog();
$user = User::get();
$query = DB::getQueryLog();
dd($query);

Sample output:

array:1 [▼
  0 => array:3 [▼
    "query" => "select * from `users`"
    "bindings" => []
    "time" => 30.66
  ]
]

Debug the Last Laravel Eloquent Query

In this sample, we will debug the last Laravel eloquent query. See below code:

DB::enableQueryLog();
$user = User::get();
$query = DB::getQueryLog();
$query = end($query);
dd($query);

Sample output:

array:3 [▼
  "query" => "select * from `users`"
  "bindings" => []
  "time" => 22.04
]

Get/Print Last Executed MySQL Query

In this section, we will get/print the last executed MySQL query. See the following example:

\DB::enableQueryLog();
$users = \DB::table("users")->get();
$query = \DB::getQueryLog();
dd(end($query));

Output:

array:3 [▼
  "query" => "select * from `users`"
  "bindings" => []
  "time" => 26.94
]

Now you have an idea of how to log/debug the last executed query in your Laravel application.

I hope this tutorial can help you. Kindly visit here https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/how-to-print-or-get-last-executed-query-in-laravel-8 if you want to download this code.

Happy coding :)
item.author: codeanddeploy

item.title: Laravel 8 PDF 教程使用 DomPDF 生成 HTML 到 PDF 文件 | Laravel 8 PDF Tutorial Generate HTML to PDF file using DomPDF
item.description:
原贴@https ://codeanddeploy.com访问并下载示例代码：
在这篇文章中是关于如何使用 DomPDF 生成 HTML 到 PDF 文件的Laravel 8 PDF 教程。 有时在我们的应用程序中，我们需要生成用于报告的 PDF 文件或发票。 让我们使用 Laravel DomPDF 包来实现这一点，这对我们来说更容易，因为我们只使用 HTML 视图并将其转换为 PDF。

所以让我们开始教程并生成 Laravel PDF。

第 1 步：Laravel 安装

如果您的本地没有安装 Laravel 8，只需运行以下命令：

 composer create - project -- prefer - dist laravel / laravel laravel - pdf - example cd laravel - pdf - example

第二步：安装 dompdf 包

要在 Laravel 中生成 HTML 到 PDF，我们需要安装barryvdh/laravel-dompdf包。 运行以下命令：

 composer require barryvdh / laravel - dompdf

第 3 步：设置路由和控制器

让我们为 Laravel PDF 生成器创建路由和控制器。

路由.php/web.php

 <?php use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route ; use App\Http\Controllers\PdfController ; /* |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Web Routes |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Here is where you can register web routes for your application. These | routes are loaded by the RouteServiceProvider within a group which | contains the "web" middleware group. Now create something great! | */ Route :: get ( '/' , function () { return view ( 'welcome' ); }); Route :: get ( 'pdf' , [ PdfController :: class , 'index' ]);

运行以下命令来制作控制器：

 php artisan make : controller PdfController

然后编辑生成的 PdfController。 见下文：

 <?php namespace App\Http\Controllers ; use PDF ; use Illuminate\Http\Request ; class PdfController extends Controller { public function index () { $pdf = PDF :: loadView ( 'pdf.sample' , [ 'title' => 'CodeAndDeploy.com Laravel Pdf Tutorial' , 'description' => 'This is an example Laravel pdf tutorial.' , 'footer' => 'by <a href="https://codeanddeploy.com">codeanddeploy.com</a>' ]); return $pdf -> download ( 'sample.pdf' ); } }

第 4 步：设置视图

现在，让我们为 PDF 生成器设置视图。 在此示例中，我在resources/views/中创建了一个 pdf 文件夹，然后创建了一个刀片文件sample.blade.php 。 请参见下面的示例代码：

 <!DOCTYPE html> <html> <head> <title> {{ $title }} </title> </head> <body> <p> {{ $description }} </p> <br> <p> Put your text here. </p> <p> Place your dynamic content here. </p> <br> <p style= "text-align: center;" > {!! $footer !!} </p> </body> </html>

现在，我们的代码已经准备好了，让我们通过运行以下命令来测试它：

然后将下面的 URL 运行到您的浏览器：

 http :// 127.0.0.1 : 8000 / pdf

下面是使用 dompdf 生成 Laravel PDF 的示例：

我希望本教程可以帮助你。 如果您想下载此代码，请访问此处https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-8-pdf-tutorial-generate-html-to-pdf-file-using-dompdf 。

快乐编码:)



原文:

Originally posted @ https://codeanddeploy.com visit and download the sample code:
https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-8-pdf-tutorial-generate-html-to-pdf-file-using-dompdf

In this post is a Laravel 8 PDF tutorial on how to generate HTML to PDF files using DomPDF. Sometimes in our application, we need to generate a PDF file for reporting or maybe an invoice. Let's do this by using the Laravel DomPDF package which is easier for us because we just use an HTML view and convert it to PDF.

So let's start the tutorial and generate Laravel PDF.

Step 1: Laravel Installation

If you don't have a Laravel 8 install in your local just run the following command below:

composer create-project --prefer-dist laravel/laravel laravel-pdf-example cd laravel-pdf-example

Step 2: Install dompdf Package

To generate HTML to PDF in Laravel we need to install barryvdh/laravel-dompdf package. Run the following command below:

composer require barryvdh/laravel-dompdf

Step 3: Setup Routes and Controller

Let's create routes and controller for our Laravel PDF generator.

routes.php/web.php

<?php use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route;
use App\Http\Controllers\PdfController; /*
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Web Routes
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------
|
| Here is where you can register web routes for your application. These
| routes are loaded by the RouteServiceProvider within a group which
| contains the "web" middleware group. Now create something great!
|
*/ Route::get('/', function () { return view('welcome');
}); Route::get('pdf', [PdfController::class, 'index']);

Run the command below to make a controller:

php artisan make:controller PdfController

Then edit the PdfController generated. See below:

<?php namespace App\Http\Controllers; use PDF;
use Illuminate\Http\Request; class PdfController extends Controller
{ public function index() { $pdf = PDF::loadView('pdf.sample', [ 'title' => 'CodeAndDeploy.com Laravel Pdf Tutorial', 'description' => 'This is an example Laravel pdf tutorial.', 'footer' => 'by <a href="https://codeanddeploy.com">codeanddeploy.com</a>' ]); return $pdf->download('sample.pdf'); }
}

Step 4: Setup View

Now, let's setup our view for our PDF generator. In this example I create a pdf folder inside resources/views/ then create a blade file sample.blade.php. See below sample code:

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head> <title>{{ $title }}</title>
</head>
<body> <p>{{ $description }}</p> <br> <p>Put your text here.</p> <p>Place your dynamic content here.</p> <br> <p style="text-align: center;">{!! $footer !!}</p>
</body>
</html>

Now, our code is ready let's test it by running the commands below:

then run the URL below to your browser:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/pdf

Here is the example generated result of Laravel PDF using dompdf:

I hope this tutorial can help you. Kindly visit here https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/laravel-8-pdf-tutorial-generate-html-to-pdf-file-using-dompdf if you want to download this code.

Happy coding :)

item.title: 使用 AWS Systems Manager 记录 SSH 和会话活动 | Logging SSH and Session activity using AWS Systems Manager
item.description:
采用可靠的日志记录实践有很多原因，毕竟它可以帮助减少故障排除时间，并且根据环境、客户或数据，经常有需要它的审计。

设置、配置和安全存储 SSH 日志可能需要大量工作，因为随着服务器实例数量的增加，问题只会变得更具挑战性。

我将向您演示如何使用 AWS 服务（请参阅下面的列表）来安全地记录和存储日志。

我假设您在开始讨论之前有一些 AWS 管理和安全经验，我不会对所有内容进行深入讨论，但我会尝试提供详细的示例配置。

我们将用于此设置的 AWS 原生服务。

  • 出于测试和演示的目的，我将使用 Amazon Linux，该实例还安装了开箱即用的 AWS SSM 代理，但您可以根据需要自由使用其他 Linux 操作系统。

    在我们开始启动任何东西之前，我们需要设置一个新的 IAM 角色，该角色将分配给我们的新测试 EC2 服务器。 这个新角色将允许将日志发送到 AWS CloudWatch 和 S3 并存储在其中。

    创建新的 IAM 角色

    我只是将我的角色称为 ssm-session-logs-demo

    然后我创建并附加了两个权限策略

    创建策略后，您可以使用我们在上面创建的 IAM ROLE 前往 AWS EC2 并启动一个新实例。 不要太担心 VPC 或安全组设置，因为我们真的不需要配置任何东西，可以使用默认值。 事实上，对于安全组，我们不需要允许任何入站规则，甚至不需要 SSH。

    设置 KMS

    从 AWS Key Management Service 控制台中，选择客户管理的密钥。

    选择创建密钥。 我将我的 Key sessionlogstocloudwatch 命名为，但您可以随意命名。

    密钥类型需要是对称的，密钥材料来源将是 KMS 或 AWS_KMS，密钥使用将被加密和解密。 密钥轮换设置为每年自动。

    示例密钥策略

    { "Version": "2012-10-17", "Id": "key-consolepolicy-3", "Statement": [ { "Sid": "Enable IAM User Permissions", "Effect": "Allow", "Principal": { "AWS": "arn:aws:iam::12345678910:root" }, "Action": "kms:*", "Resource": "*" }, { "Sid": "Allow access for Key Administrators", "Effect": "Allow", "Principal": { "AWS": [ "arn:aws:iam::428298842207:user/CMKAdmin" ] }, "Action": [ "kms:Create*", "kms:Describe*", "kms:Enable*", "kms:List*", "kms:Put*", "kms:Update*", "kms:Revoke*", "kms:Disable*", "kms:Get*", "kms:Delete*", "kms:TagResource", "kms:UntagResource", "kms:ScheduleKeyDeletion", "kms:CancelKeyDeletion" ], "Resource": "*" }, { "Sid": "Allow access to CloudWatch Log", "Effect": "Allow", "Principal": { "Service": "logs.us-east-1.amazonaws.com" }, "Action": [ "kms:Encrypt", "kms:Decrypt", "kms:ReEncrypt*", "kms:GenerateDataKey*", "kms:DescribeKey" ], "Resource": "*", "Condition": { "ArnLike": { "kms:EncryptionContext:aws:logs:arn": "arn:aws:logs:us-east-1:12345678910:*" } } } ] }

    接下来，我们将前往 AWS CloudWatch 日志和日志组。 这个日志组是我们发送 SSH 会话日志的地方。

    我们将选择创建日志组

    我将我的日志组命名为 ssm-session-logs

    我将保留期设置为 1 个月

    我将 KMS 密钥 ARN 设置为

    "arn:aws:kms:us-east-1:12345678910:key/1234abcd"

    这个确切的值对你来说会有所不同，它可以在我们上面创建 KMS 密钥时找到。

    此步骤是可选的，但除了 CloudWatch，我还想将日志存储在 S3 中。

    请参阅上面的 IAM 角色和权限，您的 S3 存储桶名称会有所不同，但基本上我们需要将其包含在策略中以允许 EC2 拥有适当的权限。

    另一个注意事项，当我创建新的 S3 存储桶时，访问权限应设置为“存储桶和对象不公开”，阻止所有公开访问 - 开启，启用默认加密，使用 AWS 密钥管理服务密钥（SSE- KMS），AWS KMS Key ARN 与我在上面使用 KMS 服务创建的 ARN 值相同。

    如果我们向下滚动到节点管理，我们将前往左侧的 AWS 系统管理器，然后选择会话管理器。 在会话管理器屏幕上，我们要选择首选项，完成后您的屏幕可能与此类似。

    测试会话

    从 AWS Systems Manager，Session Manager 部分，我们将选择 Start Session。 我将选择实例名称“ssmlogs”，您的名称会有所不同，请记住这是我们在上面启动的 AWS Linux EC2 实例，带有新的 IAM ROLE 和权限策略。

    注意会话是使用 AWS KMS 加密的！！

    现在，如果我们返回 AWS CloudWatch 日志组，打开我们创建的日志组，我们将看到新的日志事件！ 这些包含命令和其他有用的信息。

    现在，如果我们回到我们创建的 S3 存储桶，并打开新生成的文件夹和日志文件，我们将看到类似于我们在 CloudWatch 中看到的新日志事件。



原文:

There are many reasons to have solid logging practices in place, after all it can help reduce troubleshooting time, and depending on the environment, customer or data, there is often audits which require it.

Setting up, configuring, and securely storing SSH logs can be a lot of work, as the number of server instances increases the problem only gets more challenging.

I am going to walk you through a demo of using AWS services (see below for a list) to securely record and store logs.

I am assuming you have some prior AWS administration and security experience before jumping into this, I wont go into great deal on everything , but I will try and provide detailed example configs.

AWS Native Services we will be using for this setup.

  • AWS EC2 instances
  • AWS IAM
  • AWS KMS
  • AWS CloudWatch
  • AWS S3
  • AWS Systems Manager/SSM

For testing and demo purposes, I will be using an Amazon Linux, this instance also has the AWS SSM agent installed already out of the box, but you are free to use another linux OS if you want.

Before we get started with launching anything, we will need setup a new IAM role which will be assigned to our new test EC2 server. This new role will allow for logs to be sent to and stored in both AWS CloudWatch and S3.

Creating a new IAM ROLE

I simply called my role ssm-session-logs-demo

Then I created and attached two permissions policies

s3-ssm-session-logs-07

{
    "Version": "2012-10-17",
    "Statement": [
        {
            "Effect": "Allow",
            "Action": [
                "ssmmessages:CreateControlChannel",
                "ssmmessages:CreateDataChannel",
                "ssmmessages:OpenControlChannel",
                "ssmmessages:OpenDataChannel",
                "ssm:UpdateInstanceInformation"
            ],
            "Resource": "*"
        },
        {
            "Effect": "Allow",
            "Action": [
                "logs:CreateLogStream",
                "logs:PutLogEvents",
                "logs:DescribeLogGroups",
                "logs:DescribeLogStreams"
            ],
            "Resource": "*"
        },
        {
            "Effect": "Allow",
            "Action": [
                "s3:PutObject"
            ],
            "Resource": "arn:aws:s3:::ssm-session-logs-07/*"
        },
        {
            "Effect": "Allow",
            "Action": [
                "s3:GetEncryptionConfiguration"
            ],
            "Resource": "*"
        },
        {
            "Effect": "Allow",
            "Action": [
                "kms:Decrypt"
            ],
            "Resource": "arn:aws:kms:us-east-1:12345678910:key/1234abcd"
        },
        {
            "Effect": "Allow",
            "Action": "kms:GenerateDataKey",
            "Resource": "*"
        }
    ]
}

AmazonEC2RoleforSSM

{
    "Version": "2012-10-17",
    "Statement": [
        {
            "Effect": "Allow",
            "Action": [
                "ssm:DescribeAssociation",
                "ssm:GetDeployablePatchSnapshotForInstance",
                "ssm:GetDocument",
                "ssm:DescribeDocument",
                "ssm:GetManifest",
                "ssm:GetParameters",
                "ssm:ListAssociations",
                "ssm:ListInstanceAssociations",
                "ssm:PutInventory",
                "ssm:PutComplianceItems",
                "ssm:PutConfigurePackageResult",
                "ssm:UpdateAssociationStatus",
                "ssm:UpdateInstanceAssociationStatus",
                "ssm:UpdateInstanceInformation"
            ],
            "Resource": "*"
        },
        {
            "Effect": "Allow",
            "Action": [
                "ssmmessages:CreateControlChannel",
                "ssmmessages:CreateDataChannel",
                "ssmmessages:OpenControlChannel",
                "ssmmessages:OpenDataChannel"
            ],
            "Resource": "*"
        },
        {
            "Effect": "Allow",
            "Action": [
                "ec2messages:AcknowledgeMessage",
                "ec2messages:DeleteMessage",
                "ec2messages:FailMessage",
                "ec2messages:GetEndpoint",
                "ec2messages:GetMessages",
                "ec2messages:SendReply"
            ],
            "Resource": "*"
        },
        {
            "Effect": "Allow",
            "Action": [
                "cloudwatch:PutMetricData"
            ],
            "Resource": "*"
        },
        {
            "Effect": "Allow",
            "Action": [
                "ec2:DescribeInstanceStatus"
            ],
            "Resource": "*"
        },
        {
            "Effect": "Allow",
            "Action": [
                "ds:CreateComputer",
                "ds:DescribeDirectories"
            ],
            "Resource": "*"
        },
        {
            "Effect": "Allow",
            "Action": [
                "logs:CreateLogGroup",
                "logs:CreateLogStream",
                "logs:DescribeLogGroups",
                "logs:DescribeLogStreams",
                "logs:PutLogEvents"
            ],
            "Resource": "*"
        },
        {
            "Effect": "Allow",
            "Action": [
                "s3:GetBucketLocation",
                "s3:PutObject",
                "s3:GetObject",
                "s3:GetEncryptionConfiguration",
                "s3:AbortMultipartUpload",
                "s3:ListMultipartUploadParts",
                "s3:ListBucket",
                "s3:ListBucketMultipartUploads"
            ],
            "Resource": "*"
        }
    ]
}

Once the polices are created, you can head over to AWS EC2 and launch a new instance, using the IAM ROLE we created above. Dont worry too much about the VPC or the security group settings, as we wont really need to configure anything and the default can be used. In fact, for the security group, we wont need to allow any inbound rules, not even SSH.

Setting UP KMS

From the AWS Key Management Service console, select customer managed keys.

Select Create Key. I named my Key sessionlogstocloudwatch , but you can call it whatever you want.

The key type needs to be symmetric, key material origin will be KMS or AWS_KMS, key usage will be encrypt and decrypt. Key rotation is set as auto every year.

Sample Key Policy

{
    "Version": "2012-10-17",
    "Id": "key-consolepolicy-3",
    "Statement": [
        {
            "Sid": "Enable IAM User Permissions",
            "Effect": "Allow",
            "Principal": {
                "AWS": "arn:aws:iam::12345678910:root"
            },
            "Action": "kms:*",
            "Resource": "*"
        },
        {
            "Sid": "Allow access for Key Administrators",
            "Effect": "Allow",
            "Principal": {
                "AWS": [

                     "arn:aws:iam::428298842207:user/CMKAdmin"

                ]
            },
            "Action": [
                "kms:Create*",
                "kms:Describe*",
                "kms:Enable*",
                "kms:List*",
                "kms:Put*",
                "kms:Update*",
                "kms:Revoke*",
                "kms:Disable*",
                "kms:Get*",
                "kms:Delete*",
                "kms:TagResource",
                "kms:UntagResource",
                "kms:ScheduleKeyDeletion",
                "kms:CancelKeyDeletion"
            ],
            "Resource": "*"
        },
        {
            "Sid": "Allow access to CloudWatch Log",
            "Effect": "Allow",
            "Principal": {
                "Service": "logs.us-east-1.amazonaws.com"
            },
            "Action": [
                "kms:Encrypt",
                "kms:Decrypt",
                "kms:ReEncrypt*",
                "kms:GenerateDataKey*",
                "kms:DescribeKey"
            ],
            "Resource": "*",
            "Condition": {
                "ArnLike": {
                    "kms:EncryptionContext:aws:logs:arn": "arn:aws:logs:us-east-1:12345678910:*"
                }
            }
        }
    ]
}

AWS CloudWatch Log Group

Next we will head over to the AWS CloudWatch Logs, and Log Groups. This log group is where we will send SSH session logs.

We will select create log group

I named my log group ssm-session-logs

I set the retention period to 1 month

I set the KMS Key ARN to

"arn:aws:kms:us-east-1:12345678910:key/1234abcd"

this exact value will be different for you, it can be found when we created the KMS key above.

AWS S3 - Storing SSH Logs in an encrypted S3 bucket

This step is optional, but in addition to CloudWatch, I also wanted to store logs in S3.

See the IAM Role and Permissions above, your S3 bucket name will be different, but basically we need to include this in the policy to allow EC2 to have the proper permissions.

One other note, when I created my new S3 bucket, access should be set as "Bucket and objects not public", Block all public access - On, default encryption is enabled, server-side encryption using AWS Key Management Service key (SSE-KMS), AWS KMS Key ARN is the same ARN value as what I created above with the KMS service.

AWS Systems Manager Session Manager

We are going to head over to the AWS System Manger, on the left side if we scroll down to node management, then select session manager. On the session manager screen, we want to select preferences, your screen may look similar to this when you are done.

Testing Sessions

From the AWS Systems Manager, Session Manager section, we will select Start Session. I will select the instance name "ssmlogs", your name will be different, remember this was the AWS Linux EC2 instance we launched above with the new IAM ROLE and permission policies.

Notice the session is encrypted using AWS KMS!!

Now if we go back to the AWS CloudWatch Log groups, and open the log group we created, we will see new log events! These contain the commands and other useful info.

Now if we go back to the S3 bucket we created, and open the newly generated folders and log files, we will see new logs event similar to what we saw in CloudWatch.
item.author: 0xmichaelwahl

item.title: 如何创建 Laravel 8 Zip 文件并下载？ | How to Create Laravel 8 Zip file and Download?
item.description:
原贴@https ://codeanddeploy.com访问并下载示例代码：
在这篇文章中，让我们制作 Laravel 8 zip 文件并在压缩文件后下载它们。 本教程将帮助您压缩文件并使用ZipArchive类和名为stechstudio/laravel-zipstream的 Laravel 包下载它们。

因此，您将在这篇文章中学习如何在您的应用程序中实现 Laravel zip 的两种方法。

方法 #1：使用 ZipArchive 类

在此方法中，我们将使用 PHP ZipArchive 类，让我们循环选择附加到 zip 文件的文件夹并下载它。

您需要先创建一个控制器：

 php artisan make : controller ZipController

然后创建路线。 见下面的代码：

 <?php use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route ; use App\Http\Controllers\ZipController ; /* |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Web Routes |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Here is where you can register web routes for your application. These | routes are loaded by the RouteServiceProvider within a group which | contains the "web" middleware group. Now create something great! | */ Route :: get ( 'zip' , [ ZipController :: class , 'index' ]);

现在在我们的控制器中，让我们实现 Laravel zip。 下面是我们 ZipController 的完整代码。

 <?php namespace App\Http\Controllers ; use File ; use ZipArchive ; use Illuminate\Http\Request ; class ZipController extends Controller { public function index () { $zip = new ZipArchive ; $fileName = 'zipFileName.zip' ; if ( $zip -> open ( public_path ( $fileName ), ZipArchive :: CREATE ) === TRUE ) { // Folder files to zip and download // files folder must be existing to your public folder $files = File :: files ( public_path ( 'files' )); // loop the files result foreach ( $files as $key => $value ) { $relativeNameInZipFile = basename ( $value ); $zip -> addFile ( $value , $relativeNameInZipFile ); } $zip -> close (); } // Download the generated zip return response () -> download ( public_path ( $fileName )); } }

注意：不要忘记在您的公共目录中创建一个文件夹来测试此代码并放置一些文件，例如图像和 PDF。

现在，让我们上面的代码。 运行以下命令：

然后运行以下 URL：

 http :// 127.0.0.1 : 8000 / zip

现在，您将下载包含所选文件的 zip 文件。

方法 #2：使用 Laravel Zip 包

在这种方法中，我们使用的是 stechstudio 的 laravel-zipstream 包。 让我们安装它开始。

 composer require stechstudio / laravel - zipstream

然后让我们创建我们的控制器方法。 我将它命名为 method2 见下面的代码：

 <?php namespace App\Http\Controllers ; use File ; use Zip ; use Illuminate\Http\Request ; class ZipController extends Controller { public function method2 () { return Zip :: create ( 'zipFileName.zip' , File :: files ( public_path ( 'files' ))); } }

然后让我们创建我们的路线：

 <?php use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route ; use App\Http\Controllers\ZipController ; /* |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Web Routes |-------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Here is where you can register web routes for your application. These | routes are loaded by the RouteServiceProvider within a group which | contains the "web" middleware group. Now create something great! | */ Route :: get ( 'zip-download' , [ ZipController :: class , 'method2' ]);

然后使用这个包测试我们的 Laravel zip。

将 URL 运行到浏览器：

 http :// 127.0.0.1 : 8000 / zip - download

要了解有关此软件包的更多信息，请访问此处的文档。

现在，您在实现 Laravel zip 时学习了 2 种方法，希望对您有所帮助。 这取决于您将用于上述方法的内容。

我希望本教程可以帮助你。 如果您想下载此代码，请访问此处https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/how-to-create-laravel-8-zip-file-and-download 。

快乐编码:)



原文:

Originally posted @ https://codeanddeploy.com visit and download the sample code:
https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/how-to-create-laravel-8-zip-file-and-download

In this post, let's do Laravel 8 zip files and download them after we zipped the files. This tutorial will help you to zip the files and download them using the ZipArchive class and a Laravel package called stechstudio/laravel-zipstream.

So you will learn two methods in this post how to implement Laravel zip in your application.

Method #1: Using ZipArchive class

In this method, we will use the PHP ZipArchive class let's loop the selected folder that we attach to our zip file and download it.

You need to create a controller first:

php artisan make:controller ZipController

Then create a route. See below code:

<?php use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route;
use App\Http\Controllers\ZipController; /*
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Web Routes
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------
|
| Here is where you can register web routes for your application. These
| routes are loaded by the RouteServiceProvider within a group which
| contains the "web" middleware group. Now create something great!
|
*/ Route::get('zip', [ZipController::class, 'index']);

Now in our controller let's implement the Laravel zip. Below is the complete code of our ZipController.

<?php namespace App\Http\Controllers; use File;
use ZipArchive;
use Illuminate\Http\Request; class ZipController extends Controller
{ public function index() { $zip = new ZipArchive; $fileName = 'zipFileName.zip'; if ($zip->open(public_path($fileName), ZipArchive::CREATE) === TRUE) { // Folder files to zip and download // files folder must be existing to your public folder $files = File::files(public_path('files')); // loop the files result foreach ($files as $key => $value) { $relativeNameInZipFile = basename($value); $zip->addFile($value, $relativeNameInZipFile); } $zip->close(); } // Download the generated zip return response()->download(public_path($fileName)); }
}

Note: Don't forget to create a files folder to your public directory to test this code and put some files like images and PDFs.

Now, let's this our code above. Run the following command:

Then run the following URL:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/zip

Now you will download the zip file with files selected.

Method #2: Using Laravel Zip Package

In this method, we are using laravel-zipstream package by stechstudio. Let's install this to start.

composer require stechstudio/laravel-zipstream

Then let's create our controller method. I named it method2 see below code:

<?php namespace App\Http\Controllers; use File;
use Zip;
use Illuminate\Http\Request; class ZipController extends Controller
{ public function method2() { return Zip::create('zipFileName.zip', File::files(public_path('files'))); }
}

Then let's create our route:

<?php use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route;
use App\Http\Controllers\ZipController; /*
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Web Routes
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------
|
| Here is where you can register web routes for your application. These
| routes are loaded by the RouteServiceProvider within a group which
| contains the "web" middleware group. Now create something great!
|
*/ Route::get('zip-download', [ZipController::class, 'method2']);

Then test our Laravel zip using this package.

Run the URL to your browser:

http://127.0.0.1:8000/zip-download

To learn more about this package just visit the documentation here.

Now, you learn 2 methods when implementing Laravel zip I hope it helps. It's up to you what you will use for our methods above.

I hope this tutorial can help you. Kindly visit here https://codeanddeploy.com/blog/laravel/how-to-create-laravel-8-zip-file-and-download if you want to download this code.

Happy coding :)
item.author: codeanddeploy

item.title: Padronização com GitFlow - Git e Github | Padronização com GitFlow - Git e Github
item.description:
分支 e 合并

支持：São as conhecidas como Feature，Release e Hotfix。

开发：一个分支 que irá desenvolver todas as novas Features, após revisar e estar estável, ela será responsavél por realizar um merge na Master。

  • 特点： São 作为分支机构 criadas a partir da Develop que irão desenvolver uma funcionalidade especifica，fazendo Merge na Develop também。

  • 发布： Uma vez que se tem uma nova Feature incorporada na Develop, é preciso prepará-la para entrar em produção, o que não pode ser feito levando-a apenas para a Master, é preciso utilizar uma outra Branch de suporte, chamada Release。
    修补程序： São branch para realizar correçõs especificas ecriticalas que são encontradas em produção、criada a partir da Master、deve ser unida tanto com Develop quanto com a Master。

    • 普里米拉特点：

    一个分支 de feature 'feature/formulario' foi mescada com a 'develop'。

  • 分支 de feature 'feature/formulario' foi deletada localmente。
  • Agora você está na branch 'develop'. Agora você está na 分支“发展”。

    • Chegamos ao fim, com isso você será capaz de organizar a linha do tempo do seu projeto, a ideia do GitFlow não é fundamental para o desenvolvedor, mas ao longo do tempo, conforme o projeto escala e existem diversas pessoas trabalhando em conjunto ele ajuda a manter a clareza no projeto, e ajuda a padronizar a forma que é realizado o processo de branchs. Chegamos ao fim, com isso você será capaz de Organizar a linha do tempo do seu projeto, a ideia do GitFlow não é basic para o desenvolvedor, mas ao longo do tempo,conforme o projeto escala e existem diversas pessoas trabalhando em conjunto ele ajuda a manter a clareza no projeto, e ajuda a padronizar a forma que é realizado o processo de branchs。



    原文:

    Depois que aprendemos a trabalhar com as Branchs e os Merges, é importantes nós criarmos alguns padrões e organização do projeto, para não ficar aquela bagunça no histórico. Com esse pensamento o Holandês Vincent Driessen teve a brilhante ideia de criar o GitFlow.
    O Gitflow é apenas uma ideia abstrata do fluxo de trabalho normal do Git, ou seja, ele dita que tipos de branchs configurar e como realizar o merge.

    Branchs e Merge

    Antes de entendermos o GitFlow, é necessário termos dois conceito que são fundamentais, branch e merge bem claro, para isso sinta-se avontade de ler meus dois artigo onde eu explico bem isso, Conceito de Branch - Git e Github onde explico bem sobre a Branch, e Conceito de Merge - Git e Github onde falo sobre Merge.

    Fluxo do GitFlow

    Para ficar mais claro, podemos classificar o GitFlow em dois tipos de Branch:

    1. Principais: São as Branch Master e Develop;
    2. Suporte: São as conhecidas como Feature, Release e Hotfix.

    Regras das branchs:

    • Master: Utilizada para receber os commits estáveis que foram desenvolvidos na Develop, digamos que são códigos prontos para produção.

    • Develop: A branch que irá desenvolver todas as novas Features, após revisar e estar estável, ela será responsavél por realizar um merge na Master.

    • Features: São as branchs criadas a partir da Develop que irão desenvolver uma funcionalidade especifica, fazendo Merge na Develop também.

    • Releases: Uma vez que se tem uma nova Feature incorporada na Develop, é preciso prepará-la para entrar em produção, o que não pode ser feito levando-a apenas para a Master, é preciso utilizar uma outra Branch de suporte, chamada Release.
      Pode ser que apenas após a criação de um conjunto de novas Features que você tenha uma Release pronto. Porém, uma vez que essas Features estejam prontas na Develop, será possível uní-las em um Branch Release.

    • Hotfixes: São branches para realizar correçõs especificas e criticas que são encontradas em produção, criada a partir da Master, deve ser unida tanto com Develop quanto com a Master.

    Após entender a base de todo conceito, existe uma ferramenta para auxiliar a criação e exclusão de branch, chamado GitFlow Extensão.

    GitFlow Extensão:

    O GitFlow Extensões é uma extensão que auxilia no desenvolvimentos de projetos que utilizam Git, ele tem como objetivo automatizar algumas funções repetivias no processo das branchss, o que ajuda a poupar algumas linhas no terminal.
    Para começar a utilizar o GitFlow Extensões, depois de iniciar o Git com o comando git init, basta digitar:

    $ git flow init

    Ele dá a liberdade de você alterar o nome das Branch de produção, ou a develop, como mudar os prefixos das outras Branches, por exemplo:
    Alterar a branch Feature para Feat, dando uma maior liberdade para cada pessoa/time.

    Usando $ git flow init [-d] , ele aceita todos os nomes automaticamente.

    Primeira feature:

    Para criar a primeira Feature, o processo é extremamente simples:

    $ git flow feature start <NomeDaBranch>

    Com isso ele nos retorna algumas coisas, no Summary of actions:

    1. Uma nova branch foi criada 'feature/formulairo' baseada na 'develop'.
    2. Agora você está na branch 'feature/formulario'.

    Encerrando a feature:

    Após criar a primeira Feature, digamos que você já implementou e commitou todas as funcionalidades e agora precisa dar um Merge na Develop e excluir ela, para isso rodamos:

    $ git flow feature finish <NomeDaBranch>

    Voltando para o Summary of actions:, ele explica o que foi realizado:

    1. A branch de feature 'feature/formulario' foi mesclada com a 'develop'.
    2. Branch de feature 'feature/formulario' foi deletada localmente.
    3. Agora você está na branch 'develop'.

    Chegamos ao fim, com isso você será capaz de organizar a linha do tempo do seu projeto, a ideia do GitFlow não é fundamental para o desenvolvedor, mas ao longo do tempo, conforme o projeto escala e existem diversas pessoas trabalhando em conjunto ele ajuda a manter a clareza no projeto, e ajuda a padronizar a forma que é realizado o processo de branchs.
item.author: eduardoopv

item.title: 如何在 Salesforce 上创建个人项目 | How to Create Personal Projects on Salesforce
item.description:
大卫古兹曼

发表于在 Salesforce 中创建项目看似复杂，但实际上非常简单！ 所以这就是你如何做到这一点的。

先决条件

注册开发者组织


我知道你的想法，但是戴夫，我连一行代码都不知道！ 不要惊慌，这适用于架构师、管理员、业务经理等（对于 Omnistudio 开发人员，您必须访问 Vlocity Success 社区并拥有 Vlocity 许可证）。

填写字段


在填写字段之前，您应该了解几件事：

  • 用户名必须是电子邮件格式，但不一定是实际的电子邮件； 例如： daveguz@acmeindustries.com
  • 用户名在所有组织中必须是唯一的。 因为 Salesforce 就像一栋公寓楼，每个租户都必须有一个唯一的名称。

结论

现在你有了一个开发者组织，你可以混入其中并构建自定义项目。 有一些限制，例如您只能拥有两个 Salesforce 许可证用户。 但是现在您可以构建对您来说特别的项目！



原文:

David Guzman

Posted on May 12

Creating a project in Salesforce can seem complicated, but it's actually really simple! So here's how you can accomplish that.

Prerequisites

Sign Up for a Developer Org


I know what your thinking, but Dave, I don't know a single line of code! Don't panic, this applies to architects, admins, business managers, and more (for Omnistudio developers, you'll have to access the Vlocity Success community and have a Vlocity license).

Fill in the Fields


There are a couple things you should know before filling in the fields:

  • Usernames MUST be in an email format, but it doesn't have to be an actual email; ex: daveguz@acmeindustries.com
  • Usernames MUST be unique across ALL orgs. Because Salesforce is like an apartment building and each tenant must have a unique name.

Conclusion

And now you have a Developer Org you can mess around in and build custom projects. There are some limits like you can only have two salesforce license users. But now you can build projects special to you!

item.title: Python VS 朱莉娅 | Python VS Julia
item.description:
蒂娜黄

发表于朱莉娅

  • 有用的网址

    • 基本信息：

    • 一种高级的解释型编程语言，它利用垃圾收集并且是动态类型的
    • 由 Guido van Rossum 于 1991 年设计
    • 高可读性
    • 动态类型语言
    • 具有 Python 软件基础许可证的免费和开源
    • 用作脚本语言的选项
    • 大约 137,000 个图书馆
    • 解释语言
    • 可扩展和可移植的语言

    在数据科学中，Python 依赖其中许多库来处理数学和科学函数。 返回目录

    朱莉娅

    基本信息：

    • 一种多范式，主要是函数式编程语言，专为机器学习和统计编程而创建
    • 由 Jeff Bezanson、Stefan Karpinski、Viral B. Shah 和 Alan Edelman 于 2012 年创建
    • 支持通过 Unicode、UTF-8 等进行编码。
    • 与其他编程语言（如 C、Python 等）的互操作性
    • 目标是利用 R、C、MATLAB、Python 和 Ruby 等语言的所有优势，同时消除它们在机器学习、数据挖掘、线性代数、并行计算等方面的缺点。
    • 很多程序员都没听说过
    • 数据科学界肯定对 Julia 产生了浓厚的兴趣
    • 大约 4k 个图书馆

    它主要用于机器学习、数据科学、数据挖掘、数值分析和任何数学目的，因为线性代数是这种语言的核心功能。

    返回目录

    哪个最好先学？

    他们有什么共同点？

    • 以相对容易学习而闻名，即使对于那些没有编程经验的人也是如此
    • 是互动的

    他们的优势是什么？

    在科技界享有盛誉

  • 面向对象编程
  • 拥有数百万用户 = 无数精心制作的教程
  • 比朱莉娅多才多艺
  • 使用从零开始的数组索引
  • 有更多的第三方包
  • 越来越快
  • 强大的机器学习库
  • 更少的启动开销
  • 更多工作机会

    • 朱莉娅的优点：

    • 具有数学友好的语法
    • 支持元编程
    • 已编译，未解释
    • 正在开发自己的本地机器学习库
    • 设置方法等于表达式
    • 提供卓越的并行性
    • 专为机器学习和数据分析而设计
    • 和 C 一样快
    • 可以直接使用外部库
    • 具有自动内存管理
    • 加入了Pataflop 俱乐部

    返回目录

    有用的网址

    返回目录

    卡兰·普拉塔普·辛格—— May 4 5月4日



    原文:

    Tina Huynh

    Posted on May 12

    1. Python
    2. Julia
    3. Python vs Julia
    4. Helpful Links

    Basic information:

    • A high-level intrepreted programming language that makes use of garbage collection and is dynamically typed
    • Designed by Guido van Rossum in 1991
    • High readability
    • Dynamically Typed Language
    • Free and Open Source with a Python Software Foundation License
    • Option to use as a scripting language
    • around 137k libraries
    • GUI Programming Support
    • Interpreted Language
    • Extensible & Portable Language

    Python's versatility derives from the vast amount of external libraries developed by its extensive community of developers. In Data Science, Python relies on many of those libraries to handle mathematical and scientific functions. NumPy, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Pandas, and Maplotlib are some of the most commonly used.

    Back to TOC

    Julia

    Basic information:

    • A multi-paradigm, primarily functional programming language that was created for machine learning and statistical programming
    • Created by Jeff Bezanson, Stefan Karpinski, Viral B. Shah, and Alan Edelman in 2012
    • Supports encoding via Unicode, UTF-8, etc.
    • Interoperability with other programming languages like C, Python, etc
    • The goal was to take all the strengths of languages such as R, C, MATLAB, Python, and Ruby while eliminating their drawbacks in machine learning, data mining, linear algebra, parallel computing, etc.
    • a lot of programmers have never heard of it
    • The data science community has definitely developed a keen interest in Julia
    • around 4k libraries

    Julia is a dynamic, high-level, high-performance programming language, specifically created for technical computing, with a similar syntax to Python. It is mostly used in Machine Learning, Data Science, data mining, numerical analysis, and any mathematical purpose since linear algebra is a core function of this language.

    Back to TOC

    Python vs Julia

    Which is best to learn first?

    What do they have in common?

    • known for being relatively easy to learn, even for those who do not have previous programming experience
    • are interactive

    - has a straightforward syntax

    What are their advantages?

    Advantages of Python:

    • well-known in the tech community
    • object-oriented programming
    • has millions of users = countless of well-crafted tutorials
    • significantly more versatle than Julia
    • uses zero-based array indexing
    • has far more third-party packages
    • is getting faster
    • strong machine learning libraries
    • less startup overhead
    • more job opportunities

    Advantages of Julia:

    • has a math-friendly syntax
    • supports metaprogramming
    • is compiled, not interpreted
    • is developing its own native machine learning libraries
    • set methods equal to expressions
    • offers superior parallelism
    • specifically designed with machine learning and data analytics in mind
    • just as fast as C
    • can work directly with external libraries
    • has automatic memory management
    • joined the Pataflop Club

    Back to TOC

    Helpful Links

    Back to TOC

    Manikanta Inugurthi - Apr 8

    Karan Pratap Singh - May 4
